title: PlayerTask
description: A somewhat useful player task plugin
body:

![Applicable Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Applicable%20Version-1.7.x--26.x-blue)
![Paid Plugin](https://img.shields.io/badge/Paid%20Plugin-Partially%20Paid-blue)

![Latest Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fricedoc.handyplus.cn%2Fversion.json&query=%24.PlayerTask&prefix=v&label=Latest%20Version)

### I. Introduction

> PlayerTask —— A somewhat useful player task plugin    
> Server owners can easily create daily tasks/NPC tasks/scroll tasks

![PlayerTask](https://ricedoc.handyplus.cn/plugin/PlayerTask/0.webp)

1. Supports mysql and local sqlite storage (recommended to use mysql)
2. Built-in creation GUI, can create tasks in the GUI
3. Built-in player daily task GUI, can view and complete tasks in the GUI
4. Fully customizable task objectives, one task can have multiple objectives
5. Task objectives support: crafting, mining, fishing, placing, consuming, killing, submitting, enchanting, shearing, breeding, taming and more types
6. Fully customizable task rewards, one task can have multiple rewards
7. Sends actionbar to display task progress, sends title to remind task completion
8. Task rewards support: coins, points, items, task coins, custom commands, etc.
9. Can manage task objectives, task lists, and task rewards through GUI
10. Supports PlaceholderAPI variables
11. Supports spending coins/points to refresh daily completable tasks
12. Supports automatic full item cloud localization, 1.13+ supports full localization, lower versions can manually configure localization in item.json
13. Task coin shop, can customize items for sale
14. This plugin is continuously maintained and developed, view [update log](https://ricedoc.handyplus.cn/wiki/PlayerTask/log)
15. Data security, can configure automatic backup of all data to backUp folder (2.6.2+)
